events.text:
You are rewriting the page-agent website's CSS and router. The design direction: remove ALL gradient purples, blues, rainbows. Go monochrome — warm grays, off-white, near-black.

FILE 1: C:\Users\mac\page-agent\packages\website\src\index.css

Current: Has blue/purple theme colors, colorful chart colors, aurora/gradient/sparkle animations.

Rewrite to:
- Change theme colors to warm monochrome:
  - --theme-color-1: something warm neutral (like #d4a574 warm amber or just #737373)
  - --theme-color-2: same or slightly different neutral
- Keep all the shadcn variable structure but make it neutral/warm
- Light mode background: off-white like #fafaf9 or similar warm white
- Remove or keep animations but make them subtle (no aurora needed)
- Keep all the prose styling, dark mode support, scrollbar-hide
- Keep the shadcn @theme inline block (it's needed for components)

FILE 2: C:\Users\mac\page-agent\packages\website\src\router.tsx

Current: Has `bg-linear-to-br from-blue-50 to-purple-50` on the main content area.

Rewrite to:
- Remove the blue-to-purple gradient background
- Replace with plain warm off-white: `bg-stone-50 dark:from-gray-900 dark:to-gray-800` or just `bg-[#fafaf9] dark:bg-gray-900`
- Keep everything else (routing, Suspense, lazy loading, ScrollToTop)

Write both complete files. Keep all the existing structure, just change the colors.
Let me read both files first.

((cb: () => void) => setTimeout(cb, 1)) 22→ const cancel = globalThis.cancelIdleCallback ?? clearTimeout 23→ const id = schedule(() => docsImport()) 24→ return () => cancel(id) 25→ }, []) 26→ 27→ return ( 28→

What tool will the agent invoke next, and what is its primary argument?
